opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is in knots, the pain comes in intense waves, and I'm passing nothing but water. I feel like my bowel is blocked and going to rupture.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started after a heavy meal and the cramps are severe — I'm scared it's a surgical emergency.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago after a rich meal
symptom_narrative.character: severe colicky lower abdominal cramps then explosive watery diarrhoea
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: waves of cramp before each watery motion
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: passing lots of watery stool and wind; no vomiting, no fever, no bloody stool, no right-lower pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get mild watery diarrhoea usually well-tolerated

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a microscopic bowel-inflammation condition — normal colonoscopy but biopsy showed it

objective_data_offered.value: I'm passing lots of watery stool and wind; my tummy isn't visibly swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report; cannot palpate/auscultate the abdomen remotely
